name: tophant-clawvault-operator
description: Operate ClawVault services, configuration, vault presets, scanning, and local filesystem security scans from OpenClaw agents.
author: Tophant SPAI Lab

permissions_rationale.execute_command: Required to start/stop ClawVault services and run scans
permissions_rationale.write_files: Writes configuration and schedule changes to ~/.ClawVault/
permissions_rationale.read_files: Reads configuration, vault presets, scan history from ~/.ClawVault/
permissions_rationale.network: Probes service ports and communicates with dashboard API

start.description: Start ClawVault proxy and dashboard services

status.description: Check if ClawVault proxy and dashboard are running

scan.description: Scan text for sensitive data, prompt injection, and dangerous commands

scan-file.description: Scan a file for sensitive data

config-get.description: Get a configuration value by dotted key

config-set.description: Set a configuration value by dotted key

config-append.description: Append a value to a list config field (e.g. file_monitor.watch_paths). Hot-patches if dashboard running.

config-remove.description: Remove a value from a list config field. Hot-patches if dashboard running.

vault-apply.description: Apply a vault preset to active configuration (hot-patches if dashboard running)

vault-create.description: Create a custom vault preset from current configuration

vault-update.description: Update a custom vault preset's metadata or re-snapshot config

vault-delete.description: Delete a custom vault preset (builtin presets cannot be deleted)

vault-active.description: Show which vault preset is currently active

local-scan.description: Run an on-demand local filesystem scan

scan-schedule-remove.description: Remove a scheduled scan by ID

agent-list.description: List all registered agents and their detection configurations

agent-set.description: Create or update per-agent config (guard mode, detection toggles). Use --no-* flags to disable specific detection categories.

agent-remove.description: Remove an agent configuration by ID or name
